nasb.text: With my mouth I will give thanks abundantly to the Lord; And in the midst of many I will praise Him.

esv.text: With my mouth I will give great thanks to the Lord; I will praise him in the midst of the throng.

cnv.text: 我要用口極力稱謝耶和華； 我要在眾人中間讚美他。

ccb.text: 我要竭力颂扬耶和华， 在众人面前赞美祂。

csbs.text: 我要用口大大称谢耶和华， 在众人中间赞美他；
